name: Eli Roth Presents: The Legion of Exorcists
original_name: Eli Roth Presents: The Legion of Exorcists
overview: Evil is on the rise. Standing on the frontlines of this spiritual war is the Legion of Exorcists, who use their faith to keep the devil's minions at bay. These are the true stories of their battle to save humanity's soul, one exorcism at a time.

trailers.title: Eli Roth Presents: The Legion of Exorcists Trailer
